breakdown.creativeCore: Diabetes Causal Chain Infographic：A dense bilingual medical poster explaining the full progression of diabetes from glucose intake and insulin dysfunction to systemic complications, suitable for educational or editorial health visuals.
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, full-body, cutaway, callout, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, 3d]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
